summary: Tested all requested UI features: Travel Booking modal headers (Traveler Details, Choose Your Seats, Baggage & Extras, Trip Summary) all have consistent dark blue gradient. Hotels Results has dark blue highlighted header with hotel icon, Edit button opens editable fields. Hotel cards include description. Restaurant Results View Menu navigates correctly to /services/restaurants/menu?id={id}.

minor.issue: Mixed content warning - HTTP endpoint called from HTTPS page

seed_data_creation: Used sessionStorage to set up travel booking data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified and working correctly. Travel Booking page has consistent dark blue gradient headers (from-[#082c59] to-[#0a4a8f]) for all sections. Hotels Results has dark blue header with hotel icon, editable search fields (destination, check-in, check-out, guests), and hotel cards display description. Restaurant Results View Menu button navigates to /services/restaurants/menu?id={id}.

travel_booking_traveler_details_header.test: Traveler Details header has dark blue gradient
travel_booking_traveler_details_header.details: Header uses bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59] to-[#0a4a8f] (line 497 in TravelBooking.jsx)

travel_booking_choose_seats_header.details: Header uses bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59] to-[#0a4a8f] (line 523 in TravelBooking.jsx)

travel_booking_baggage_extras_header.details: Header uses bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59] to-[#0a4a8f] (line 600 in TravelBooking.jsx)

travel_booking_trip_summary_header.details: Header uses bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59] to-[#0a4a8f] (line 654 in TravelBooking.jsx)

hotels_results_dark_blue_header.details: Header uses bg-gradient-to-r from-[#082c59] to-[#0a4a8f] with Hotel icon (line 692, 747 in HotelsResults.jsx)

hotels_results_edit_button.details: Edit button toggles isEditingSearch state, showing editable fields for destination, check-in, check-out, guests (lines 694-741)

hotels_results_card_description.details: HotelCardGrid displays hotel.description in line-clamp-2 paragraph (lines 184-187 in HotelsResults.jsx)
